Meaning.En: Three times as great in size, amount, or degree.
Meaning.Example: The population of the city has tripled in the last decade.

Situation.Vi: Mô tả sự tăng trưởng hoặc quy mô tăng lên ba lần.
Situation.En: Used when describing something that has increased to three times its original size or value.

Situation.Vi: Trong toán học: nhân một số với 3.
Situation.En: In mathematics: multiplying a number by three.

Meaning.En: A set of three items, or the number obtained by multiplying a given number by three.
Meaning.Example: She ordered a triple espresso and a triple-decker sandwich.

Situation.Vi: Khi gọi món có ba lớp hoặc ba phần.
Situation.En: Used when ordering food or drink with three layers or portions (e.g., triple-decker sandwich, triple shot).

Situation.Vi: Trong thể thao: ba điểm (trong một số môn như bóng rổ hoặc bóng đá Mỹ).
Situation.En: In sports: referring to a three-point shot or play (e.g., in basketball or American football).

Meaning.En: To increase by three times; to multiply by three.
Meaning.Example: The company’s profits tripled after the new marketing campaign.

Situation.Vi: Mô tả sự tăng trưởng đột biến về số lượng hoặc giá trị.
Situation.En: Used when describing a rapid or significant increase to three times the original amount.
